title: Animal Armor Trims - Horse & Wolf
description: Now you can add trims to horse and wolf armor!
body:
![Animal Armor Trims](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Animal_Armor_Trims/BH_AAT_header.webp) You can now use your trims to modify the appearance of horse and wolf armor (in 1.20.6 and later)! The functionality is simple, and very similar to the vanilla function of the trims. Simply, instead of putting on a piece of player armor, put on any of the horse or wolf armor! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Animal_Armor_Trims/BH_AAT_summary.webp) Basically, you will be able to add trims to horse armors, and also to wolf armors from version 1.20.6, version in which they were added. Now your animals will look much nicer, since their armors will be compatible with all Minecraft vanilla trims.This is fantastic! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Animal_Armor_Trims/BH_AAT_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Animal_Armor_Trims/BH_AAT_screenshots.webp) ![Animal Armor Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YmFaSpcI/images/b2383da7a8ae2d8a35d811b957ebe003f92dac0e.jpeg) ![Animal Armor Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YmFaSpcI/images/920e9a01168f96aa2bee71e157920e2c667648b9.jpeg) ![Animal Armor Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YmFaSpcI/images/13dce6b84b433df325fc796840f28c16954d6a2a.jpeg) .
